g.onclick: sendPrompt('What user request data gets logged for drift detection?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI serve predictions and log them?')
sendPrompt('How does PSI detect data drift?')
sendPrompt('What happens when PSI is below 0.1?')
sendPrompt('What happens when PSI is between 0.1 and 0.2?')
sendPrompt('What happens when drift is detected above PSI 0.2?')
sendPrompt('How does dvc repro retrain the model?')
sendPrompt('What does MLflow do after retraining?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI pick up the new model version?')
